'''raraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oker|oker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oker|oker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| raraka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rærækæth || rærækæj || rærækæsh || rærækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rararakath || rararakaj || rararakash || rararaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rarakath || rarakaj || rarakash || raraka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rarafkafth || rarafkafj || rarafkafsh || rarafkaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rarakatha || rarakaja || rarakasha || rarakaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || rarakath || rarakaj || rarakash || raraka
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rarakathal || rarakajal || rarakashal || rarakakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rarakaathatha || rarakaajaja || rarakaashasha || rarakaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || rarakathan || rarakajan || rarakashan || rarakakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rarakathaoro || rarakajaoro || rarakashaoro || rarakakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
